name: Carrot Walnut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt together in a small bowl and set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the sugar, oil, and eggs. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Add the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
4. Stir in the carrots and walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 X 5 X 3-inch loaf pan.
6. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F. oven for 1 hour or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Remove from the pan and finish cooling on a wire rack.
